__comment__: Milestone 2 subset — Array folder re-added for issue #73 Stage D. Sparse storage + hole-aware built-ins (commits 23052c0 / 15f4e40 / 1074240) landed in the interpreter; compiled mode still uses dense List<object?> backing so `compiledExcludeFolders` holds Array out until Stage E ports sparse storage into the emitter. Known interpreter gap: indices > int.MaxValue - 1 (e.g. S15.4.5.2_A1_T1.js: x[4294967294]=1) still throw RangeError — widening the index API to uint32 is tracked separately.
